offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations causes compliance issues. We automate tax regulation monitoring and updates instead of manual tracking.
problem: Keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry for a few invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common entries as reusable templates
Set default reminders for tax updates
Allow CSV import for existing records
